paradigm.top_level: modular monolith (single Next.js app under app/)
paradigm.internal_layering: n-tier — pages/ -> components/ -> context/ -> lib/ — imports flow strictly downward
paradigm.hexagonal_seam: app/src/lib/marmot/ adapts marmot-ts ports (NostrNetworkInterface, EventSigner) via NdkNetworkAdapter.ts and signerAdapter.ts

module_map.name: chat (shared shell)
module_map.purpose: Renders message list + input toolbar; receives sendMessage prop. Same component for DM and group surfaces.
module_map.epic_role: Compose-area emoji picker trigger lives in input toolbar; reaction badge row is appended below each message bubble; reaction-trigger handle is a hover/long-press affordance on each bubble.

module_map.name: contacts (DM surface)
module_map.purpose: DM-specific transport controller; owns NDK subscription, NIP-04 decrypt today (NIP-17/59 gift wrap after D9), optimistic send.
module_map.epic_role: Transport rewrite for D9 (NIP-17/59); plus reaction send/receive plumbing for DMs.

module_map.name: groups (MLS group UI)
module_map.purpose: Group-chat UI components (membership, invites, polls, images, etc.).
data_owned: per-group view state for invites, polls, members
module_map.epic_role: Reuse via GroupChat.tsx — wires reactions through ChatStoreContext.

module_map.name: nostr_transport
module_map.epic_role: NIP-17/59 gift-wrap helper added here; reaction send/receive functions added; legacy NIP-04 decrypt kept inbound-only.

module_map.name: marmot_integration
module_map.purpose: Adapter sub-layer translating marmot-ts ports to NDK+IDB; chat & group persistence over idb-keyval.
module_map.epic_role: Reactions persistence module added alongside chatPersistence (new file, same idb-keyval pattern).

module_map.name: context_providers
module_map.purpose: App-level provider stack mounted in pages/_app.tsx and pages/groups.tsx.
module_map.epic_role: MarmotContext gets a kind-7 case in its applicationMessage dispatch (line ~534); ChatStoreContext gains reaction state mirror; new ReactionsContext or module-singleton store may be added.

module_map.name: i18n
module_map.purpose: Single Copy type + en/de objects; useCopy() hook in LanguageContext.
module_map.epic_role: All emoji-feature UI strings (picker label, reaction add/remove, error toast) added to Copy + both languages, with companion .i18n.test.ts coverage.

in_app_message_shape.notes: Reactions feature needs id (lookup) and senderPubkey (NIP-25 'p' tag). The 'groupId' field doubles as the thread key and persists per-message identity for DMs.

current_seams.event_bus_pattern: Version-counter integers in MarmotContext (chatVersion, profileVersion, pollVersion) bumped on IDB write; consumers re-read IDB when counter changes. unreadStore.ts uses a module-singleton + useSyncExternalStore for unread counts.

send_event_abstractions.group: sendRumorSafe in MarmotContext.tsx:72-96 (wraps group.sendApplicationRumor with retry)

buildRumor_helper.signature: buildRumor(kind, content, pubkey, tags) -> rumor with hashed id and no sig

dm_transport_today.subscription: ContactChat.tsx:79-136 — incomingSub + outgoingSub via NDK subscribe
dm_transport_today.kind_dispatch: absent — all kind-4 events are treated as chat
dm_transport_today.GAP_vs_spec: Spec assumes NIP-17 / NIP-59 gift-wrap (§2.2). D9 in decisions.md migrates to NIP-17/59 globally; D9a keeps kind-4 inbound forever for backwards compat.

group_transport_today.encryption: MLS application message via marmot-ts / ts-mls
group_transport_today.kind_dispatch: if/else-if in MarmotContext.tsx:534+ over rumor.kind. Add case 7: here.
group_transport_today.ALIGNMENT_vs_spec: Matches §3 of spec. No transport changes needed.

persistence.primitive: idb-keyval (default and named stores). No SQLite/wasm anywhere.
persistence.clear_account_data: clearAccountScopedIdbData in storage.ts:223-237 — must be extended to clear reactions

optimistic_ui_pattern.groups: tempId = crypto.randomUUID() inserted before send (ChatStoreContext.tsx:177); removed on failure; inbound rumor de-duplicates by id.
optimistic_ui_pattern.dms: Sign event first, use real event id, insert before publish (ContactChat.tsx:148) — avoids NDK echo race.
optimistic_ui_pattern.reactions: Adopt the same split: temp UUID for groups, real event id for DM gift-wraps.

bubble_affordances_today: NONE. ChatBox.tsx has zero onContextMenu / hover menus / per-bubble action buttons. Reaction trigger is the first bubble-level interactive affordance — no existing pattern to follow.

i18n.rule: Every new UI string must have en + de entries on Copy and a .i18n.test.ts assertion for both.

static_export_constraints.implication_for_reactions: Publishing goes browser -> relay over WebSocket. No relay proxy. No server endpoint. Static-friendly.

make_targets.test_unit: make test-unit (cd app && npx vitest run)
make_targets.platform_caveat: All targets enforce ensure-deps platform stamp; never run npx vitest / npx playwright directly.

testing_conventions.mocking_pattern: vi.mock at module scope + dynamic await import('@/src/lib/...') inside test body. Each file rolls its own inline in-memory idb-keyval Map fake.
testing_conventions.e2e_relay: real strfry + blossom-mock via docker-compose.e2e.yml (E2E_GROUPS=1 only)
testing_conventions.e2e_state_bridge_pattern: expose window.__quizzlSomething for live state injection (notification-bell.spec.ts:23-29)
testing_conventions.selectors: data-testid first, getByRole({ name }) for accessible names, getByText only for human copy assertions
testing_conventions.ci: NONE — no GitHub Actions workflow. Manual test gate before deploy.
testing_conventions.popover_reference: app/src/components/NotificationBell.tsx is the only existing Chakra <Popover>; mirror its useDisclosure + PopoverTrigger/Content/Body/Arrow skeleton for pickers.

boundary_rules: Imports flow downward only: pages -> components -> context -> lib. Never reverse.
components/chat/ChatBox.tsx imports the ChatMessage *type* from lib/marmot/chatPersistence — type-only is acceptable.
ChatStoreContext dynamically imports @internet-privacy/marmot-ts at runtime (line 122) to keep MLS code out of SSR.
All crypto init runs behind globalThis.isSecureContext (MarmotContext.tsx:243) — required because ts-mls crashes without crypto.subtle.
DM and group surfaces do not share state — DM uses local useState in ContactChat; groups use ChatStoreContext. Reactions must be implemented for both surfaces; share *helpers* not state.
patterns_to_reuse: Version-counter event bus (MarmotContext.tsx:584-586) — add reactionVersion for groups; module-singleton store like unreadStore.ts for DM reactions.
Optimistic write -> async publish -> rollback on failure (ChatStoreContext.tsx:171-198, ContactChat.tsx:144-168).
Transport-agnostic sendMessage prop on ChatBox (ChatBox.tsx:79-82) — extend with a sendReaction analog.
rawPublish for pre-signed events (NdkNetworkAdapter.ts:52-95) — gift-wrapped DM events are pre-signed; bypass NDK re-sign.
Dynamic import for heavy crypto modules (_app.tsx:12-20, MarmotContext.tsx:254).
data-testid on every interactive and state-bearing element.
open_risks: Bubble-level affordances are net-new for the project — UX placement (hover handle vs. + button vs. long-press) needs a small design pass; planner should produce a concrete decision in the picker story spec rather than a 'TBD'.

DM transport migration (D9) significantly expands scope. Inbound dual-decode (kind-4 + kind-1059) and outbound NIP-17/59 wrap need their own stories ahead of any reaction work for DMs. Sequence reactions-after-migration to avoid double-rework.
No CI gate. Verifier must run make test locally and the architect baseline + final gate is the only enforcement of the green-test invariant.
No @testing-library/react. Picker UI behavior (cursor insertion, focus, escape-close) must be exercised in E2E or refactored into pure functions for unit testing.
